nasb.text: Both their own iniquities and the iniquities of their fathers together,” says the Lord. “Because they have burned incense on the mountains And scorned Me on the hills, Therefore I will measure their former work into their bosom.”

esv.text: both your iniquities and your fathers’ iniquities together, says the Lord; because they made offerings on the mountains and insulted me on the hills, I will measure into their lap payment for their former deeds.”

cnv.text: 我要同時報應你們的罪孽和你們列祖的罪孽，這是耶和華說的， 因為他們曾在山上燒過香， 在岡陵上譏笑過我， 我必把他們以前所行的量在他們的懷中。”

ccb.text: 按他们和他们祖先的罪报应他们。 我必按他们的所作所为报应他们， 因为他们在山上烧香， 在丘陵上亵渎我。 这是耶和华说的。”

csbs.text: 因为他们在山上烧香，在冈陵上辱骂我， 所以我必称量他们先前的行为，报应在他们怀中。”
